title: Easy Beginner Recipes
description: Simple, approachable recipes for anyone just starting to cook

home.heroSubtitle: Simple, approachable recipes for anyone just starting to cook

blocks.content: Each recipe on this site is written for someone who is just starting out. You will find a clear ingredient list, step-by-step instructions, and a tip to help you get it right. Start with whichever recipe looks most appealing — there is no wrong choice.
